skills.description: Builds production-ready REST API endpoints with validation, error handling, authentication, and documentation. Follows best practices for security and scalability.
trigger_conditions: User asks to 'create an API endpoint' or 'build a REST API'
anti_triggers: Creating CRUD operations without proper validation and error handling

skills.description: API design principles and decision-making. REST vs GraphQL vs tRPC selection, response formats, versioning, pagination.
Create production-ready FastAPI projects with async patterns, dependency injection, and comprehensive error handling. Use when building new FastAPI applications or setting up backend API projects.
trigger_conditions: Starting new FastAPI projects from scratch
Implementing async REST APIs with Python
Building high-performance web services and microservices
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to fastapi project templates
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope

skills.description: A developer skilled in GraphQL API design and optimization, addressing common pitfalls like N+1 queries and deep nested queries.
anti_triggers: not using DataLoader for batch querying

skills.description: A specialized workflow for building production-ready Python backends with FastAPI, featuring async patterns, SQLAlchemy ORM, Pydantic validation, and comprehensive API patterns.
trigger_conditions: Building new REST APIs with FastAPI
anti_triggers: Developing simple scripts without a backend
Using synchronous patterns instead of async

skills.description: Build end-to-end type-safe APIs with tRPC, focusing on routers, procedures, middleware, subscriptions, and Next.js/React integration patterns.
trigger_conditions: Express + React) where the client and server share a single repo
Adding real-time features (subscriptions) to an existing tRPC setup
anti_triggers: Using REST/GraphQL schema overhead for type safety
Not using shared context state in procedures
